sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107511" key="u(pereutuxh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερευ-τῠχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n107511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exceedingly lucky,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:29:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
